title: Bydgoszcz、Kuyavian-Pomeranian — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Bydgoszcz、Kuyavian-Pomeranianの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

BydgoszczはKuyavian-Pomeranianにある人口348,190の都市です。A charming city on the Brda River, known for its picturesque waterfront, Art Nouveau architecture, and a growing IT and business services sector.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
